name: Shamiram Urshan
description: '''Shamiram Urshan''' (1938 – 25 June 2011), also known as '''Shamiram Ourshan''' and occasionally '''Shamiram Oshana''' ({{langx|syr|ܫܡܝܪܡ ܐܘܫܥܢܐ}}), was an [[Assyrian Americans|Assyrian American]] singer and entertainer originally from [[Iran]], who gained popularity in the 1980s.
